content.text:
Based on the visualization of the molecule, I can now clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom 41 (F).

From the image, atom 41 is a fluorine atom (light blue sphere) that is covalently bonded to atom 35 (carbon, orange sphere). Looking at the molecular structure, F:41 has only one covalent bond - to C:35.

The geomconf_index for this molecule can be determined from the filename "geomconf_6250.xyz", which indicates the geomconf_index is 6250.

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 41 (F) are:
- Atom 35: C (carbon)

Geomconf_index: 6250

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 41, whose element should be F. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
